Name: UObjectLibrary
Description: Class that holds a library of Objects

Variables.Name: ObjectBaseClass
Variables.Description: Class that Objects must be of. If ContainsBlueprints is true, this is the native class that the blueprints are instances of and not UClass

Variables.Name: bHasBlueprintClasses
Variables.Description: True if this library holds blueprint classes, false if it holds other objects

Variables.Name: bUseWeakReferences
Variables.Description: If this library should use weak pointers

Variables.Name: bIsFullyLoaded
Variables.Description: True if we've already fully loaded this library, can't do it twice
